name: Meridian RD
bestFor: So light, it is life changing. Next thing you know you are spending 100 pounds a month on bike gears.
description: So light, it is life changing. Next thing you know you are spending 100 pounds a month on bike gears.
highlights: Carbon frame and fork for climbing and long days in the saddle
Shimano 105 groupset — reliable shifting without the pro-team price tag
32 mm tyre clearance for UK chip-seal and the occasional cobble

name: Summit TR
bestFor: Full suspension for when the trail gets spicy and your confidence gets mild.
description: Full suspension for when the trail gets spicy and your confidence gets mild.
highlights: 150 mm front and rear travel for proper trail days
12-speed drivetrain with a wide-range cassette for steep climbs
Dropper-post ready — add one when the descents get serious

name: District CB
bestFor: The sensible choice, fits its in a flat share hallway.
description: The sensible choice, fits its in a flat share hallway.
highlights: Gates Carbon belt drive — quiet, clean, almost no maintenance
Upright geometry for traffic visibility and all-day comfort
Mudguard and rack mounts for year-round commuting

name: Volt EV
bestFor: Feeling a bit lazy? Arrive at the office looking fresh. Battery good for longer than your smartphone.
description: Feeling a bit lazy? Arrive at the office looking fresh. Battery good for longer than your smartphone.
highlights: 250 W motor with smooth pedal assist up to 25 km/h (UK legal limit)
Up to 90 km range on a single charge — enough for a week of commuting
Integrated lights and lock mount for daily city use
